keys.description: Enables the App Sandbox, restricting access to system resources and user data.
Allows the app to make outgoing network connections.
Allows the app to listen for incoming network connections.
Allows read-write access to files chosen by the user via an Open or Save panel.
Allows read-only access to files chosen by the user via an Open panel.
Allows read-write access to the user's Downloads folder.
Allows the app to record video from the built-in camera or external video inputs.
Allows the app to record audio using the microphone or other audio inputs.
Allows the app to interact with USB devices directly.
A list of keychain access groups that the app is a member of.
Specifies the environment for Apple Push Notification service (APNs). (e.g. development, production)
Specifies the domains associated with this app for features like Universal Links.
A list of iCloud containers that the app can access.
Specifies which iCloud services (CloudKit, iCloud Documents) the app uses.
The Apple Developer Team Identifier associated with your provisioning profile.
A list of App Groups shared between your app suite for container and keychain access.
